tools.name: find-stores
tools.description:
Find nearby Tim Hortons store locations. This tool returns store addresses only.
    This is a Tim Hortons app — any mention of "restaurant", "store", or "location"
    refers to Tim Hortons. Do not ask the user to clarify which restaurant they mean.
    It does NOT provide menu items, food prices, nutritional info, deals, promotions,
    or offers. NEVER call this tool for those questions, even if a location is mentioned.
    Do NOT call this tool for questions like:
      - "What's on the menu at the location nearest me?"
      - "What's the price of a coffee at [address]?"
      - "Is there a deal for donuts at [location]?"
    Use this tool ONLY when the user's primary intent is to find where Tim Hortons stores are located.
    The user may provide a city, ZIP/postal code, or street address.
    If they do not, use available request metadata (user coordinates or city) automatically.
    Do NOT ask the user for their location — always call this tool first and let the server
    resolve coordinates from the request metadata. Only if the server returns a needsInput
    response should you then ask the user for a city, ZIP/postal code, or address.
    Do not use this tool for general brand questions that are not asking to find nearby stores.
